NUMERIC_UNGROUND.description: Numeric claim value not found in any evidence chunk with matching metric and period.

NUMERIC_VALUE_MISMATCH.description: Numeric value found in evidence but with different value representation.

METRIC_VALUE_MISMATCH.description: Value found but metric does not match on the same evidence chunk.

PERIOD_VALUE_MISMATCH.description: Value found but period/year does not match on the same evidence chunk.

PERIOD_AMBIGUOUS.description: Multiple periods found in proximity; cannot determine which applies.

CITATION_MISSING.description: Numeric claim has no citation reference.

CITATION_UNRESOLVED.description: Citation reference could not be resolved to any source.

CITATION_NOT_RETRIEVED.description: Source chunk_id not found in retrieved evidence.

CITATION_PAGE_MISMATCH.description: Source page does not match evidence page for the given chunk_id.

CITATION_DOCUMENT_MISMATCH.description: Source document_name does not match evidence document_name (lenient match).

CITATION_CHUNK_MISSING.description: Source has no chunk_id and cannot be verified.

CITATION_DOES_NOT_SUPPORT_CLAIM.description: Cited source evidence does not contain the claim's value.

DOCUMENT_COVERAGE_MISSING.description: Requested document has no evidence coverage.

CALCULATION_MISMATCH.description: Answer contains a numeric value that contradicts the calculation result.

UNIT_MISMATCH.description: Unit in answer does not match evidence.

PERIOD_MISMATCH.description: Period in answer does not match evidence.

VALIDATOR_EXCEPTION.description: Validator raised an exception; result is FAILED (fail-closed).
